name: data-privacy
description: Regulatory data-handling (GDPR/CCPA): PII classification and data mapping, data-subject rights (access, erasure, portability) with reach across logs/caches/backups/processors, consent and lawful basis, retention and deletion policies, minimization, pseudonymization, and audit trails — a firing data-privacy skill and a /data-privacy:review command. The compliance layer above code-level security review.
